creator: andrej@ebert.su
text:
(In reply to Konstantin Belousov from comment #7)

Sorry, I really don't know how to do that.

But i did try different 10-STABLE revisions in jails, and it's fine up to base r296649, and starts crashing with base r296727 on 10-STABLE and keeps crashing at least up to 11-STABLE base r303255.

I have a slight temperature problem at the moment(need a bigger case) and can't rebuild world to go to a newer revision of 11-STABLE, but maybe someone's willing to confirm by building and trying to start sonarr in a jail or on a machine that's on a revision higher than base r296649.
